summary: Critical task requirements unmet: No Pester test file, no test fixtures, workflow lacks test harness/act integration, no act-result.txt artifact, no actionlint validation shown, no TDD methodology evidence. PowerShell missing Set-StrictMode, $ErrorActionPreference='Stop', -ErrorAction Stop on cmdlets. Regex matching duplicated in Get-BumpType (~lines 34-50) and Get-ChangelogEntry (~lines 82-105). Workflow assumes version.json/commits.txt exist without setup. Task explicitly requires all tests run through act with structured workflow accepting test fixture data—none exists here.
